message:
style(packs/kubernetes/helm): cargo fmt + alphabetize Severity import

src/packs/kubernetes/helm.rs:
- Move `crate::packs::Severity` to alphabetical order in the test
  module's `use` list (after `crate::packs::test_helpers::*`).
- Apply `cargo fmt`'s preferred single-line formatting to the
  short-enough `assert_blocks` and `assert_blocks_with_severity`
  calls in `helm_blocks_each_destructive_pattern` and
  `helm_blocks_with_correct_severity` (the multi-line argument lists
  were artifacts of the original test author; they fit on one line).

No semantic change.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
